title: ILAORE's TFC 32x
description: Textures of item, blocks and gui in 32x32 extension for Terra Firma Craft.
body:
ILAORE's TFC 32x is a resource pack that improves the textures for the TerraFirmaCraft mod. It makes the game more realistic by increasing the resolution of the textures to 32x32. You can see examples of the textures below.

I recommend using this resource pack with Faithful 32x for the best visual effect, but whatever you use it with, make sure that ILAORE's TFC 32x is above all the others in the list for proper functioning.

In addition, this resource pack supports some of the addons for the original TerraFirmaCraft mod, such as:

- TFC Water Flasks - full support, all flasks have their own textures.
- FirmaLife - partial support, some items and blocks are improved to 32x32.

In the future, it is planned to expand the support for addons and improve the textures that have not been changed yet.

Credits:

- TerraFirmaCraft: the main mod and many textures that I improved.
- TFC TNG Faithful32: inspiration and some textures.
- Vexxed Visuals: this resource pack was made based on Vexxed Visuals.
- Faithful 32x: inspiration, some textures and textures from their resource pack that I used for the base of these textures.

Thanks a lot to Acid_Bath for developing the textures for the plants.
